business_model.model: subscription allots monthly credits, credits buy exports
business_model.notes: Subscription IS required. No free tier without subscription. Credits are the sole unit of consumption. NEVER reference dollar pricing ($0.99, $1.99, $4.99, etc.) in any copy — only credit-based pricing.

uploads.notes: Uploaded source videos are retained for 24 hours only.

exports.notes: Generated exports (clips, GIFs, thumbnails, canvases) are retained for 29 days.

retention.summary: Uploads = 24 hours. Exports = 29 days. These are different. Never conflate them.

product.name: CUTMV
product.input: Full-length music videos (MP4, MOV, AVI — 500MB to 10GB)

contradictions_resolved.issue: FAQ pricing showed dollar amounts ($0.99/$1.99/$4.99) instead of credit system
contradictions_resolved.resolution: All pricing references must use credits only. Never reference dollar amounts in copy.
contradictions_resolved.action: Remove or rewrite any copy containing dollar-based pricing. Replace with credit-based language.

contradictions_resolved.issue: Privacy policy stated '24 hours' for generated content, but exports last 29 days
contradictions_resolved.resolution: Uploads are retained 24 hours. Exports are retained 29 days. These are distinct.
contradictions_resolved.action: Any copy about retention must distinguish uploads (24h) from exports (29d).

contradictions_resolved.issue: Terms said 'no subscription required' but subscriptions exist
contradictions_resolved.action: Any copy or legal text saying 'no subscription required' must be corrected.

contradictions_resolved.issue: Conflation of upload retention and export retention as a single number
contradictions_resolved.resolution: Always specify which retention applies: uploads = 24h, exports = 29d.
contradictions_resolved.action: Generic 'your files are deleted after X' must clarify which files.
